summary: iOS 🟥 HSFWCH-10257 | FALCON 🎧 Custom EQ settings are not saved
scenario: Custom EQ slider adjustments are not persisted after saving and reopening the EQ settings
description_clean: Custom EQ settings are not saved. Steps: Pair Falcon with the app, go to Device Settings > Sound > Tune, select Custom, change sliders, tap Save EQ, then close and reopen EQ settings. Observed: Custom EQ is selected but all sliders reset to default (middle) position. Expected: Changes to custom EQ sliders should be properly saved.
steps: Go to Device Settings > Sound > Tune
expected: Changes to custom EQ sliders should be properly saved.
actual: Custom EQ is selected but all sliders reset to default (middle) position.
